# harness_fme_segment (Resource)

Create and delete a Harness FME (Split) segment. Import id format: `org_id/project_id/segment_name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Segment name.
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.
- `traffic_type_id` (String) Split traffic type ID.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Segment description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
